ayahs.translation: By the fig and the olive

ayahs.arabic: لَقَدْ خَلَقْنَا ٱلْإِنسَـٰنَ فِىٓ أَحْسَنِ تَقْوِيمٍ
ayahs.translation: We have certainly created man in the best of stature;
Then We return him to the lowest of the low,

ayahs.arabic: إِلَّا ٱلَّذِينَ ءَامَنُوا۟ وَعَمِلُوا۟ ٱلصَّـٰلِحَـٰتِ فَلَهُمْ أَجْرٌ غَيْرُ مَمْنُونٍ
ayahs.translation: Except for those who believe and do righteous deeds, for they will have a reward uninterrupted.
ayahs.transliteration: Illa allatheena amanoowaAAamiloo assalihati falahum ajrun ghayrumamnoon

ayahs.translation: So what yet causes you to deny the Recompense?
Is not Allāh the most just of judges?
